description: Composition Blue, green, red and white gingham check shirt made of 100% cotton with a washed effect, with long sleeves and buttoned cuffs, spread collar with tape detailing on the inseam, front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered brand logo and curved hem with godet detailing on the side seams Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery Update your casual style with this gingham check shirt from belmonte. The muted green, blue and red give a grown up air to the checks, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans or chinos and leather slip-on shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
